description: Perform an on-page SEO health audit for https://books.toscrape.com/. Export the page title issue data to a CSV in ~/Documents/SEO/exports/ (filename must contain 'title') and the meta description issue data to a CSV in ~/Documents/SEO/exports/ (filename must contain 'description'). Write a summary report at ~/Documents/SEO/reports/onpage_audit_report.txt containing the total page count, count of missing descriptions, and at least one recommendation.
